operations.description: Allocation to operational expenses with room for growth as the platform scales. Operations are prioritized to ensure sustainable infrastructure and team growth.

founder.description: Allocation to founder for project creation, vision, and ongoing leadership

civic.description: Allocation to civic initiatives, public good projects, and community engagement. This includes base civic fund allocation (10%) plus remainder (30%) after R&D budget allocation, ensuring civic mission receives all residual revenue.
initiatives: Open data advocacy and access programs

research_and_development.description: Allocation to R&D for cryptographic improvements and protocol enhancements. This budget is subject to periodic review, with any unallocated remainder flowing to the civic fund.

notes: This revenue distribution model prioritizes operational sustainability (40%) while ensuring strong civic commitment (40% total: 10% base + 30% remainder). The R&D budget (10%) is subject to periodic review, with any unallocated funds flowing to the civic fund. This ensures operations are funded first, founder receives fair compensation (10%), and civic initiatives receive guaranteed base funding plus all residual revenue. All percentages are subject to review based on business needs and market conditions.
